subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-08-06
subcodes.first_line: Today we are enjoying temperate weather. As there are many strangers present, we will answer questions.
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @Tahirih [Qurratu'l-'Ayn], @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @veiling [hijab], @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @oneness; unity of religion, @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @conference of Badasht
